intro: Gymnosiphon nanus, also known as the dwarf yellow-flowered Gymnosiphon, is a rare, twining, evergreen vine belonging to the family Burmanniaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Gymnosiphon nanus include saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Gymnosiphon nanus is often used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in some traditional African and Asian folk medicines.
